xsl:stylesheet.extension-element-prefixes: datetime set math dateConversion myext nestedJsonParser strings

ns2:query.xsl:variable:
select id,servicename,amounttran/100,mobilenumber,destaccount,destmobilenumber,walletcurrency,TRANSDATETIME,respcode,userid,concat(firstname,lastname)as fullName ,substr(TRANSDATETIME,0,8) as date_trans,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(transdatetime, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') as date_trans
from WALLET.ws_log
WHERE TRANSDATETIME BETWEEN '
